markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 202. Control of Transp. Assets
##### § 202.114 — Management

If requested by the department, property acquired by advance acquisition may be managed by the General Land Office on behalf of the department as the department and the General Land Office may agree. Subchapter E (Real Property Accounting and Records) , Chapter 31 (General Land Office) , Natural Resources Code, does not apply to property acquired under this subchapter.

*Added by Acts 2003, 78th Leg., ch. 1325, Sec. 3.02, eff. Sept. 1, 2003.*
